qa_pairs.question: How can a Digital Research Alliance of Canada user request Rapid Access Service (RAS)?
qa_pairs.answer: To request Rapid Access Service (RAS), users should fill out the form available at https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeU_BoRk5cEz3AvVLf3e9yZJq-OvcFCQ-mg7p4AWXmUkd5rTw/viewform.
